title: 50 Red Plastic Party Cups 12oz - Versatile Plastic Cups for Birthdays, Hen Parties, Stag Do & Student Nights - Ideal for Juice & Summer Fun - Reusable American Style
features: Durable & Versatile: Crafted from high-quality plastic, these 12oz red cups are perfect for holding a variety of beverages, from refreshing juices to your favorite. Their sturdy design ensures they won’t easily collapse, making them ideal for any occasion, from casual hangouts to festive celebrations.

Great for Party Games: Make your game nights unforgettable! These iconic red cups are essential for party games, providing the perfect balance of style and function. Get ready for competitive fun with friends, whether you’re playing for bragging rights or just for laughs.

Easy Cleanup: Say goodbye to post-party mess! With these disposable cups, you can enjoy your event without worrying about washing dishes. Simply toss them in the recycling after use, allowing you to focus on having fun with your guests.

Reusable Option: Not only are these cups convenient for single use, but they are also durable enough to be washed and reused. This eco-friendly feature makes them a great investment for your parties, saving you money and reducing waste while still providing a festive touch.
Made from premium food-grade plastic, the red party cups are lightweight and durable and can be used again and again.
description: Product Description EVOKK Red Disposable Party Cups – Classic Style for Modern Celebrations, The Life of Every Party Classic style to any event with EVOKK Red Disposable Paper Party Cups. These 12oz American-style cups are perfect for birthdays, hen parties, stag dos, student nights, and summer gatherings. Made from durable, coated paper, they resist leaks and can be reused during the event. Ideal for juice, soft drinks, or punch, they offer easy cleanup with no mess. Whether indoors or out, EVOKK cups bring fun, function, and effortless party flair to any occasion.
